'''Valc VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Perinn sector/Legends|Perinn sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] near the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].

==History==
By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the planet had become an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]].<ref name="TEA" />

It was the farthest Imperial world from [[Vector Prime]]. At the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was governed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Crowal]].

{{Planet-stub}}
